stations.name: Groove Salad
stations.description: A nicely chilled plate of ambient/downtempo beats and grooves.

stations.name: Drone Zone
stations.description: Served best chilled, safe with most medications. Atmospheric textures with minimal beats.

stations.name: Deep Space One
stations.description: Deep ambient electronic, experimental and space music. For inner and outer space exploration.

stations.name: Space Station Soma
stations.description: Tune in, turn on, space out. Spaced-out ambient and mid-tempo electronica.

stations.name: Lush
stations.description: Sensuous and mellow female vocals, many with an electronic influence.

stations.name: Secret Agent
stations.description: The soundtrack for your stylish, mysterious, dangerous life. For Spies and PIs too!

stations.name: Beat Blender
stations.description: A late night blend of deep-house and downtempo chill.

stations.name: Fluid
stations.description: Drown in the electronic sound of instrumental hiphop, future soul and liquid trap.

stations.name: DEF CON Radio
stations.description: Music for Hacking. The DEF CON Year-Round Channel.

stations.name: Underground 80s
stations.description: Early 80s UK Synthpop and a bit of New Wave.

stations.name: Indie Pop Rocks!
stations.description: New and classic favorite indie pop tracks.

stations.name: Left Coast 70s
stations.description: Mellow album rock from the Seventies. Yacht not required.

stations.name: Boot Liquor
stations.description: Americana Roots music for Cowhands, Cowpokes and Cowtippers

stations.name: Metal Detector
stations.description: From black to doom, prog to sludge, thrash to post, stoner to crossover, punk to industrial.

stations.name: SF 10-33
stations.description: Ambient music mixed with the sounds of San Francisco public safety radio traffic.

stations.name: SLAY Radio
stations.description: Commodore 64 remixes, chiptunes and demoscene music, hosted live.

stations.name: Radio Paradise
stations.description: Eclectic DJ-curated rock, world and electronica, hand-picked and crossfaded.

stations.name: Radio Paradise Mellow
stations.description: The quieter side of Radio Paradise: acoustic, downtempo and ambient.

stations.name: FIP
stations.description: Radio France's genre-hopping station: jazz, rock, world, electronica, no ads.

stations.name: FIP Jazz
stations.description: FIP's all-jazz stream, from bebop to contemporary.

stations.name: KEXP 90.3 FM
stations.description: Seattle's legendary listener-supported station, DJ-driven and fiercely independent.

stations.name: WQXR
stations.description: New York's classical music station.
